docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,320.63 FILED BY FILESAFE AS TO DEFENDANT KENT, ALLEN J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
